headline: Sir Snoozealot McPillow Wins Award For Most Hours Slept In A Year, Didn't Show Up To Accept
summary: The award was delivered to his bedside. He hasn't opened it yet. 'Probably next week,' he murmured.
fullBody: Sir Snoozealot McPillow has won the 'Golden Pillow' award for sleeping 8,760 hours in a single year—every single hour. 'I'm honored,' McPillow said without opening his eyes. The award ceremony was delayed three times because McPillow 'couldn't make it.' A representative accepted on his behalf, reading a pre-written speech: 'zzzzzz.' McPillow plans to defend his title next year by sleeping 'even harder.'
